column1: Hey Jadyn Hahn, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Hey Spiffy! Our dates are March 10-15, group size is 9!
cool i got you, which destination were you lookin to book?
We're looking into all the options right now. So info on Cancun, Cabo and Punta Cana would be great if you could do that!
word yea i can send you a bunch of options. i personally recommend punta cana, thats actually where i'll be this year
how many ppl in your group so far?
nicee thats a solid squad! we all from the same school?
There's a wide mix of us! Most of us are college students, a few graduated early but we're all from Nebraska!
oh dope! i've heard good things about Nebraska lol, i'll hook it up with a good group rate
need that energy on spring break lol
putting this info together for you rn, how soon were you looking to get things started?
We're looking to get things started as soon as possible- thank you!!
perfect, cool if i send through email? its a little long for text
dope. ill slide you in on our cyber week deal and add the payment plan so things are easy for everyone
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
sorry didnt realize my text sent twice, said not delivered a first lol my b
did you specifically want to do the 10th to 15th for exact dates? or any time that week
overall most ppl travel on the 7th that week. we can adjust for the 10th though if needed
10th-15th would be wonderful since some of us go to different schools. not everyone will be on spring break so that's what worked best for everyone!
okay cool yea no prob. will make the quote examples for those dates!
just sent those over lmk if it came through
got it!! we'll take a look at these and i'll get back to you !
we're interested in the punta cana one!! could we get flights added on so we could see what the full price would be?
Awesome, which airport we wanna fly out of?
So its looking like the best way to save money is for y'all to buy your flights separately on your own. did some digging
I found this american airlines flight thats super affordable $593 https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/JxMy7GoxBzZbR2Sr6
Ok!! Would airport transportation be covered through you guys? That's one thing we're concerned about!
Yea! we still pick you up from the airport you just enter your flight info into your account and our operatiosn team takes it from there. we'll be ready for you when you land
Ok perfect!! We are actually interested in Krystal Cancun - how could we get a trip page set up?
Let's do it, illl set it up rn. Still 9 of you?
pardon the delay just sent that over. had to make sure we had 3 rooms avail but we're good!
the email has details on how to get on and get started. each person gets their own account and adds their own details

sweet! does the deposit go towards the full payment? what would be the most cost efficient way to go about the rooms? we like the $799 option for the 4 person room but that leaves 1 person left out.. there's no availability for a 5 person room is there?
Yea deposit goes towards the full total!
So the max standard occupancy at most all inclusive resorts is 4 ppl
I can see if I can get you discounted a little! Lemme work on it rn
I was able to slide in the cyber week deal from last week to get it down to 849 per person!
perfect!!! thanks so much - that's what we'll go with :)
just want to confirm before we book flights - we'd be flying into cancun international airport right?

hi!! everyone's able to get their deposits paid but i'm unable to login into my account. i see that my name is reserved but my password is not working and i'm not getting a password reset sent to my email so i'm not able to see where i can pay for the deposit ? i'm honestly sure what to do haha
Hey try hitting the join trip button next to your name
It says that this email already exists lol which it does but when i go to the sign in page and enter the password it says invalid credentials 😅 is there any chance we could delete my account?
is there another email you could try?
can you make it to where i can join the trip again? it say temporary reserved
got it!! thanks for all your help! everyone was also able to get their flights booked !
Dope yea np they can just enter their flight info into their accounts
Hey! Is there any chance we can add one more person, is that possible?
hey yea we can. to which room?

Hi! Quick question about the flight info we’re submitting. My friends and I are all on the same flight for the trip — is it okay that I only entered my flight details, or do you need each person to submit their info individually? Just want to make sure everything’s set correctly for airport pickup. Thanks! We also no longer need to add another person!
hey sorry i missed this! but everyone will half to put in the info on their accounts, just so operations knows exactly who's who for pickup
okay sounds good! i'll have everyone do that!

Hi Spiffy! I wanted to reach out after seeing the email about the Post-Departure Travel Protection this morning. We booked our Cancun trip back in December and didn’t purchase insurance at that time, so I just want to make sure I understand what’s currently being offered.... Is this considered “full coverage,” or is it limited to post-departure benefits only? Specifically, would this cover us if we needed to cancel before the trip due to safety concerns or travel advisories, or does it only apply once we’ve already left? With everything going on in Cancun right now, we just want to understand what our options are if we’re no longer comfortable going. Would there be any refund, credit, or insurance reimbursement available in that situation? Thanks!
Jadyn whats up! Totally get the concern. yea the CFAR Travel Protection Insurance with Travel Insured does cover cancellation prior to the trip

If you didnt get it in Dec though you may be outside of the window to add it onto your purchase. there are definitely other insurance plans out there that would cover the purchase up to this range in time since the booking

From what I know at the moment, the stuff going around is tied to other parts of Mexico, not the Cancun hotel zone where our resorts are. Cancun tourism areas are heavily secured and operating normally currently
If the U.S. government were to officially restrict travel to Cancun, we'd immediately notify everyone and outline next steps
If you are uncomfortable with Mexico, I am able to switch your destination to Punta Cana which is where I'll be. Same pricing you've already paid, just a clean swap
Thanks for this info! Let me chat with my group - we're definitely interested in Punta Cana but need to see how it'd work with flights.
When do we need to let you know on our decision? We're heavily considering Punta Cana right now but just wanna see if there's a deadline to switch.

hey morning! since the the US Embassy released that there is no travel ban for Cancun travel and that things are operating as normal yesterday afternoon, we can still do a switch to Punta Cana but there will be a pricing difference to accommodate the switch
what would the pricing difference be??

Hi Jadyn! So right now, we are offering all of our travelers a discounted rate of 400 for our 4 night Punta Cana stay. Since things are operating as normal in Cancun and the reservation is locked with Grand Oasis, the only option we have available is to offer an entirely new reservation at a different destination. Considering the circumstances that is the discount we have available
hey Jadyn! just emailed over the info on where to find our transportation service when you land
did y'all want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?
Liked “hey Jadyn! just emailed over the info on where to find our transportation service when you land”

Hi Spiffy! So sorry that i'm just now getting back to you!! Thanks for getting all that info sent over. Quick question about the booze cruise - which day is it and how much would it be per person? We'll probably skip the party pass since our group tends to make decisions pretty last minute. A few of us may potentially be interested in Coco Bongo though. Could you let me know the options and pricing for that as well?
Okay cool! Safe travels today, you can add party passes or booze cruise on site while you check in today with our team
